product: Genie follow-up questions and instruction processing
tagline: Follow up questions for text responses in Genie: Genie now suggests follow up questions for text responses that include no generated SQL or results.
what_it_does: Follow up questions for text responses in Genie: Genie now suggests follow up questions for text responses that include no generated SQL or results. Previously, follow up questions appeared only after responses with a result set. Now, prompts such as Explain the data set also return suggested follow up questions to help Genie Space users explore the data.
why_it_matters: Improved instruction processing in Genie: Genie's chain of thought reasoning has been refined to prioritize and adhere to the most relevant instructions based on the user prompt.
key_takeaway: Follow up questions for text responses in Genie: Genie now suggests follow up questions for text responses that include no generated SQL or results.
